traits.name: Standing Leap
traits.description: The bulette's long jump is up to 30 feet and its high jump is up to 15 feet, with or without a running start.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 30 (4d12 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Deadly Leap
actions.description: If the bulette jumps at least 15 feet as part of its movement, it can then use this action to land on its feet in a space that contains one or more other creatures. Each of those creatures must succeed on a DC 16 Strength or Dexterity saving throw (target's choice) or have the Prone condition and take 14 (3d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 14 (3d6 + 4) Slashing damage. On a successful save, the creature takes only the damage and doesn't have the Prone condition. The bulette can then make one Bite attack without using an action.

save.on_failure: Prone and 14 (3d6 + 4) Bludgeoning plus 14 (3d6 + 4) Slashing damage

tactical_info.tactics: Burrows underground, uses tremorsense to track prey, leaps from burrow for deadly leap combo
